title: DesignDocEnrichOutput
description: Output of the design_doc_enricher agent. Provides module_role (one entry per unique module_tag), evidence_type and acceptance_criteria (one entry per spec_id).

modules.description: One entry per unique module_tag. Defines the responsibility of the module.

module_tag.description: Unique module tag (matches module_tag column values in the design spec).

module_role.description: Single allowed implement module_role token (e.g. api, domain, frontend) matching commands.implement.allowed_module_roles. Not a prose sentence. Shared by all specs with the same module_tag.

specs.description: One entry per spec row. Provides concrete acceptance criteria derived from the requirement text.

spec_id.description: spec_id of the row to enrich (matches spec_id column).

evidence_type.description: Most appropriate evidence type for verifying this requirement, or NA when no evidence type applies.

acceptance_criteria.description: Concrete, testable acceptance criteria derived from the requirement. Set to NA when evidence_type is NA.
